query:
SELECT u.id, u.name, u.email, u.role,
       m.id AS mandate_db_id, m.mandate_id, m.status AS mandate_status, m.subscription_id, m.created_at
FROM users u
LEFT JOIN gc_mandates m ON m.user_id = u.id
WHERE u.name LIKE '%Naomi%Gibson%'
LIMIT 5;
